top_signals.title: US, Iran Reach Interim Hormuz Agreement, Halting War
top_signals.summary: The US and Iran said they reached an interim agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, setting the stage for 60 days of negotiations on the fate of Tehran’s nuclear program. Officials from the two countries will meet in Switzerland on June 19 to formally sign the agreement. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran Deal Offers Glimmer of Hope After False Dawns
top_signals.summary: Details of the agreement have yet to be spelled out, but oil markets are responding with optimism.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran, US agree to halt war and reopen Hormuz, sending oil prices tumbling - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Iran, US agree to halt war and reopen Hormuz, sending oil prices tumbling  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Aerospace Supplier Doncasters Seeks $746.7 Million in US IPO
top_signals.summary: Doncasters Group, a manufacturer of products for aerospace engines and industrial gas turbines, is seeking to raise as much as $746.7 million in an initial public offering, joining a wave of aerospace and defense companies tapping public markets amid rising demand for aircraft and military equipment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Oil Below $90 a Barrel After Trump Cancels Iran Strikes - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Oil Below $90 a Barrel After Trump Cancels Iran Strikes  WSJ
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy acquires another 1,587 bitcoin for $100 million
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: A year after Meta tapped Alexandr Wang to build a new AI model, Zuckerberg has to sell it
top_signals.summary: Mark Zuckerberg's mega spending spree began a year ago, when he lured Alexandr Wang to oversee a new AI strategy. The results so far are underwhelming.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ‘Still adding dots’: Michael Saylor’s Strategy buys another 1,587 bitcoin for $100 million as total holdings reach 846,842 BTC
top_signals.summary: Strategy's total holdings account for more than 4% of the 21 million bitcoin supply cap — worth around $56 billion.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Aztec Connect’s abandoned smart contract exploited for $2.1M
top_signals.summary: The Aztec Connect platform was deprecated in March 2023, but the immutable smart contract still held over $2 million in crypto assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Labour MP: Social media ban risks locking young people out of learning
top_signals.summary: High-quality, creator-led video content is a valuable resource; it is not the same thing as social media consumption. Any legislative intervention has to be capable of recognising this distinction and the scale of our concern should not be an excuse for blunt solutions, says Feryal Clark Digital creators are trailblazers of a revolution; one that is [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CFTC sues New Mexico over prediction market jurisdiction
top_signals.summary: New Mexico is the eighth state sued by the CFTC over prediction markets, as Gary Gensler doubted the regulators' claim of authority over sports event contracts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
